title: Punk Hazard’s Mystery Deepens
description: On pages 15–18, this part follows Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is punk hazard’s mystery deepens.
scene: The scene focuses on punk hazard’s mystery deepens, with Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What kind of timing is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's so weird. Kind of like buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No wonder your ways are barbaric !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Now cease your endless prattle, foul pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But, Nami- San... the door won't budge...

summary: Punk Hazard’s Mystery Deepens. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
